subcodes.first_line: The Mentioned One maketh mention of His Lord's remembrance, when He appeared through His Name, whereby the heaven was rolled up and the sun was darkened [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یذکر المذکور من ذکر ربه اذ ظهر باسمه الذی به طویت السماء و اظلمت الشمس و
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @suffering and imprisonment, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world
